title: Soak Test - No Headset connected, app in the foreground, phone idle
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app remains stable and responsive after prolonged idle soak test with no headset connected
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure no Poly Bluetooth headset is connected to the phone.
3. Leave the app in the foreground (Home screen) with the phone idle for multiple hours (e.g., overnight).
4. After the idle period, wake the phone and observe the Poly Studio Mobile app.
expected: The Poly Studio Mobile app remains stable and responsive. No app crash, freeze, or out-of-memory error occurs. The Home screen is displayed correctly and responds to user input.
